---
title: "CsCl_Intracellular_Solution_Timepoints"
author: "Mirja grote Lambers"
date: "2026-05-03"
output: html_document
---
  
This script calculates descriptive statistics (mean ± SEM, median, SD, n) and tests for differences in membrane potential (Vm) of pericytes patched with CsCl intracellular solution at two timepoints: t0 immediately after break-in and t1 after > 600 s, using a nonparametric studentized permutation test for paired data (npar.t.test.paired, nparcomp, Konietschke & Pauly, 2012).

H0: Vm does not differ systematically between t0 and t1 (relative effect p = 0.5).
H1: Vm differs systematically between t0 and t1 (relative effect p ≠ 0.5, two-sided).


library(nparcomp)

df <- read.csv("CsCl_Intracellular_Solution_Timepoints.csv")

# descriptive statistics
desc_stats <- function(x, label) {
  x      <- na.omit(x)
  n      <- length(x)
  sd_val <- sd(x)
  cat(sprintf("\n%s (n = %d)\n", label, n))
  cat(sprintf("Mean ± SEM = %.2f ± %.2f mV\n", mean(x), sd_val / sqrt(n)))
  cat(sprintf("Median     = %.2f mV\n", median(x)))
  cat(sprintf("SD         = %.2f mV\n", sd_val))
}
desc_stats(df$holding_t0, "t0")
desc_stats(df$holding_t1, "t1")

# normality check on differences
diff <- df$holding_t1 - df$holding_t0
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
hist(diff, main = "Differences – Histogram", xlab = "Δ Vm (mV)",
     col = "steelblue", border = "white")
qqnorm(diff, main = "Differences – QQ-Plot")
qqline(diff, col = "red")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# npar.t.test.paired
df_long <- data.frame(
  Vm        = c(df$holding_t0, df$holding_t1),
  timepoint = factor(rep(c("t0", "t1"), each = nrow(df)))
)

set.seed(42)
np <- npar.t.test.paired(Vm ~ timepoint, data = df_long,
                        alternative = "two.sided",
                        info        = FALSE,
                        plot.simci  = FALSE,
                        round = 6)
summary(np)
plot (np)
